label: Transparent Concord grape motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Grape transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a Concord grape cluster motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A tight cluster of round Concord grapes with deep violet skins, uneven powder bloom, pale grape highlights, small leaf-green vineyard leaves, curling tendrils, and vine-brown stem structure. Natural fruit accuracy, crisp cutout edges, lush vineyard identity.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include cluster, leaves, tendrils, and stem without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no raspberry drupelets, no blueberries, no wine bottle, no glass, no basket, no hand, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no loose fruit pile.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Grape light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Grape", derived from a Concord grape cluster cutout. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Grape, Concord Grape Cluster, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from deep violet grape skins, dusty powder bloom, pale grape flesh highlights, leaf-green vineyard leaves, vine-brown stems, and cool vineyard shadows. The board must read as Concord grape, not raspberry, blueberry, or generic purple.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: lush vineyard product system, 8px radius, warm off-white surfaces, Concord violet primary actions, powder-bloom muted panels, leaf-green success and focus states, vine-brown borders, pressed-skin ink text, subtle circular bloom texture and tendril dividers.
Constraints: no wine branding, no grape-only monochrome purple UI, no raspberry seed texture, no blueberry shrub cues, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Grape", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Grape dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Grape" / "Concord Grape Cluster". Use the existing Concord grape motif and light-mode design-system board as references. Translate the light board into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Required visible sections: Morphous Grape, Concord Grape Cluster, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve deep violet grape skins, powder-bloom blue-grey, leaf green controls/status, vineyard stem brown structure and borders, cream/pale grape neutrals, tendril dividers, rounded cluster rhythm, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/tertiary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, table rows, sidebar navigation, command search palette, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets.
Visual details: pressed grape-skin dark backgrounds, vine-brown cards, pale grape foreground, Concord violet active states, powder-bloom chart fills, leaf-green status, subtle circular bloom texture, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no wine bottles, no wine branding, no raspberry, no strawberry, no parrot, no maple leaves, no blueberry cues, no neon violet, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Grape".
